DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-19-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on TUE-JUL-19-2016:
Jaymee Faith Cadiz Sagisi, Esq. of Greenstein & McDonald (T: 415.773.1240) for the plaintiff / opposing party Rosalinda Constantino.
Merrit Jones, Esq. of Bryan Cave (T: 415.675.3435) for the defendant / moving party CIT BANK, N.A. (FKA One West Bank N.A., Erroneously Sued as "One West Bank").

The Court, having reviewed the briefs submitted and having heard oral argument, adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT CIT BANK, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the first cause of action for plaintiff to allege fraud with requisite specificity as to each element of cause of action for concealment, including the basis for moving defendant's liability as to the (1) concealment inducing Plaintiff to move in and (2) concealment inducing Plaintiff to stay. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. Causes of action 2-7 are sufficiently alleged. Order signed in open court.
Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: L. Fong; matter not reported. (501)
